$comment: Higgsfield MCP server bridged into pi by pi-mcp-higgsfield. Tools are namespaced higgsfield__<tool>. ${HIGGSFIELD_TOKEN} is substituted from the environment at connect time.

higgsfield.$comment: Higgsfield AI image/video generation MCP over streamable HTTP. Requires HIGGSFIELD_TOKEN. Disabled by default; opt in from the extensions panel.
